serviceNotes.engine oil: OM648 3.2L inline-six diesel: flexible ASSYST up to 25,000 km / 12 months; rec 15,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.poly-V belt: Accessory belt ~100,000 km. From ~2006 many E 280 / E 320 CDI use OM642 V6—see Mercedes-E-W211-Diesel-OM642 for 2006–2009.

serviceSources.engine oil: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU & ASSYST PLUS — maximum indicated Oil Service up to 25,000 km / 12 months for OM648 inline-six CDI. Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service (OM642 proxy) lists 10,000 km — retained 25,000 km as ASSYST maximum ceiling (EU).
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211/S211) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — OM648 CDI air filter 60,000 km / 48 months (inspection table)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W211) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W211 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.fuel filter: Mercedes-Benz W211 OM648 EU service sheet — diesel fuel filter 60,000 km; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 30,000 km for OM642 (database variance)
serviceSources.coolant: Mercedes-Benz E-Class W211 owner's manual EU — long-life coolant ~150,000 km; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service lists 90,000 km / 5 years for E 320 CDI — confirm model year
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 / 722.9 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil preventive ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W211 4MATIC workshop orientation
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential preventive ~60,000 km — workshop orientation
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: 4MATIC / RWD rear differential oil preventive ~60,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive
serviceSources.poly-V belt: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7633-2006/service — serpentine belt 90,000 km (OM642 proxy); file REC 100,000 km preventive
